pet_notes: Hyein from NewJeans as a 2D Q-version doll-like official merch standee desktop pet. Prioritize preserving the face likeness from the two official cartoon references: same cute round facial proportions, very large black eyes with soft purple eye-ring/eyeshadow accents, small calm smiling mouth, bright orange-red hair with a small blue butterfly hair clip near the top, a longer side lock falling on the right side of the face, and the tiny purple side ear accessory detail. Keep the front-facing cute doll identity and readable official character silhouette. Use a clean front-facing base pose suitable as canonical source art for animation.
style_notes: 2D chibi toy-doll feeling, official merchandise standee art, flat cel shading, crisp dark outlines, clean sprite silhouette, non-realistic. Avoid 3D, photorealism, pixel-art final look, clay render, plush-photo material, glossy app-icon style, painterly rendering, gradients, shadows, text, watermark, scenery.
house_style: Codex digital pet sprite style: pixel-art-adjacent low-resolution mascot sprite, compact chibi proportions, chunky whole-body silhouette, thick dark 1-2 px outline, visible stepped/pixel edges, limited palette, flat cel shading with at most one small highlight and one shadow step, simple readable face, tiny limbs, and no detail that disappears at 192x208. Avoid polished illustration, painterly rendering, anime key art, 3D render, vector app-icon polish, glossy lighting, soft gradients, realistic fur or material texture, anti-aliased high-detail edges, and complex tiny accessories.
